context: Tests whether the iOS localization skill preserves the boundary between localization-focused locale-aware formatting and deeper standalone FormatStyle API design.

checklist.name: Routes custom style
checklist.description: Routes custom ParseableFormatStyle design to the swift-formatstyle skill or standalone FormatStyle domain.

checklist.name: Routes interval style
checklist.description: Routes Date.IntervalFormatStyle auditing to the swift-formatstyle skill or standalone FormatStyle domain unless the request is specifically localization-facing.

checklist.name: Routes URL style
checklist.description: Routes URL.FormatStyle display design to the swift-formatstyle skill or standalone FormatStyle domain unless the request is specifically localization-facing.

checklist.name: Localization boundary
checklist.description: Explains that ios-localization covers FormatStyle when the work is locale-aware display for localization and internationalization.

checklist.name: Minimum locale advice
checklist.description: Includes minimum localization advice, such as respecting user locale and avoiding hardcoded date, number, separator, abbreviation, or URL presentation assumptions.

checklist.name: Multiple locales
checklist.description: Mentions testing or reviewing under multiple locales where formatting is user-facing.

checklist.name: No implementation
checklist.description: Does not produce a full custom FormatStyle or ParseStrategy implementation.

checklist.name: No domain collapse
checklist.description: Does not collapse swift-formatstyle's standalone formatting scope into ios-localization.

checklist.name: Short routing
checklist.description: Keeps the answer short and routing-oriented rather than writing a broad localization guide.

checklist.name: No language prerequisite
checklist.description: Does not imply localization only matters after adding translated languages.
